summary: Add Workbench BFF Problem Details, operations logging hooks, and product payload budgets for the WTS recruiter control-plane stack.
rationale: Task 0D keeps raw conversation-agent APIs on their existing error contract while giving /api/agent/workbench/* a stable BFF-facing Problem Details envelope, correlation IDs, validation regions, replay-gap observability, and capped Workbench snapshots.
verification: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 uv run --group dev python -m pytest tests/test_workbench_static_frontend.py tests/test_react_workbench_cutover_gate.py -q -p no:cacheprovider
PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 uv run --group dev python -m pytest tests/test_agent_workbench_contract.py -q -p no:cacheprovider
CI=1 pnpm --dir apps/web-react exec vitest run src/lib/stream/agentStream.test.ts src/lib/stream/agentStreamReducer.test.ts src/lib/stream/agentStreamView.test.ts --run
uv run ruff check src/seektalent_ui tests/test_agent_workbench_problem_details.py tests/test_agent_workbench_contract.py tests/test_agent_workbench_stream_consistency.py
deletion_targets: Workbench BFF errors that only expose the raw conversation-agent error schema
Workbench validation errors without correlation IDs or public regions
uncapped Workbench snapshot arrays that can exceed the product payload budget
risks: Raw /api/agent/conversations routes must keep the existing agent_http_error contract.
Payload caps must preserve recent transcript data and must not fabricate omitted items.
Problem Details must avoid leaking raw validation inputs or provider payloads.
